name: pet
description: YHA pet — frontend half. Owns the FloatingPet overlay (sprite, patrol, idle behaviors, playground), the PetConsoleBubble toast, the PetHeaderButton (registered into the secondary headerIconButtons row at order 20), the hatch wizard UI (HatchModal + FrameNudgeModal + PetGalleryModal + the hatch engine under hatch/), the petStore + hatchStore + petConsoleStore Zustand stores, and the /pet local slash command. Disabling this module hides the secondary-row pet icon, removes the floating sprite, and 404-handles /pet slash commands silently. The bridge half (POST /v1/pet-console/ask, /v1/pets/*) is the `pet` bridge module — both should usually be toggled together.
